calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2002 Continued To Feb-14-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Plntf'S Application For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court On Verified Complaint For Declaratory Relief And Quiet Title
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Elizabeth McDonald,Esq., for plaintiff Beatrice Tentes
Douglas Borchert is sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiffs. After hearing the evidence presented, the Court grants the judgement for declatory relief and quiet title. The estate of George Christopher owns the interest in the property known as Parking Space # 16, as shown on the "Map of The Nob Hill" recorder November 29, 1963, and that Defendant Zerimar Investment Company owns no interest in the property known as Parking Space # 16, as shown on the "Map of The Nob Hill" recorder November 29, 1963. Order signed in open court.
Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 30, 2002
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DUPLICATE ERROR
